Seo.title: Case Study: AirDNA Website Prismic, Next.js, TypeScript, Algolia & Graphql
Seo.description: RW Infotech revamped AirDNA’s website with Prismic Slice Machine, Next.js, and GraphQL, boosting speed, SEO, and multilingual support for global growth.

body.Title: AirDNA
body.Description: We helped AirDNA overcome slow load times, outdated technology, and limited multilingual support by upgrading to Prismic Slice Machine and optimizing Next.js/MUI. With streamlined API calls via GraphQL and a cleaned-up codebase, we enhanced site performance and user experience. Adding French language support expanded global reach, while speed improvements boosted Google PageSpeed scores to 90+.

content.text: AirDNA is a leading analytics platform for short-term rental markets (Airbnb, Vrbo). By analyzing pricing, occupancy trends, and competitive data, it empowers hosts and investors to optimize revenue and uncover high-potential opportunities in the dynamic vacation rental industry.
AirDNA’s outdated marketing website (built with Prismic CMS,
, and MUI) struggled with slow performance and developer bottlenecks. We modernized their CMS using

Slice Machine, optimized components and APIs (GraphQL and REST), and introduced French and English multilingual support. This overhaul increased Google PageSpeed scores to above 90, enabling faster global access and empowering their marketing team with self-service updates.

AirDNA’s marketing website faced challenges with slow load times, outdated technology, and a lack of multilingual support. Built on an older version of Prismic CMS with cluttered code, the site performed poorly on Google’s speed tests, negatively impacting SEO and user experience. With their internal developers focused on app development, the marketing team couldn’t quickly update content or resolve issues—resulting in a stagnant site that struggled to support global growth.

We rebuilt the website’s foundation by upgrading to Prismic Slice Machine for smoother content management and optimizing the Next.js/MUI framework for enhanced speed. We cleaned up legacy code, streamlined API calls with GraphQL, and added French language support to attract international users. By collaborating closely with the marketing team, we delivered a faster, multilingual site that now scores over 90 on Google PageSpeed, enabling AirDNA to scale effortlessly.

We collaborated with AirDNA’s marketing team to design and build reusable, brand-aligned components and landing pages in Next.js and MUI. These modular templates allowed them to launch campaigns faster, maintain visual consistency, and adapt content effortlessly via Prismic, with no developer delays.

We elevated AirDNA’s website performance by enhancing Next.js rendering, refining MUI components, and optimizing GraphQL/REST API calls. The outcome? Lightning-fast load times, consistent 90+ PageSpeed scores, and a robust infrastructure built to manage global traffic surges seamlessly.
We implemented a mobile-first strategy, designing every component to be fully responsive and optimized for seamless performance across all devices, from smartphones to desktops.

body.Title: Planq
body.Description: Planq is a mobile-first blockchain network designed to make Web3 accessible to everyone, especially mobile users. By focusing on easy usability, cross-chain compatibility, and seamless mobile access, it empowers users around the world to engage with decentralized technology—without needing a desktop.

content.text: Planq is a mobile-first blockchain network designed to make Web3 accessible to everyone, especially mobile users. By focusing on easy usability, cross-chain compatibility, and seamless mobile access, it empowers users around the world to engage with decentralized technology—without needing a desktop.

Planq’s previous website had an outdated design and lacked clarity in communicating its mobile-first blockchain vision. We built a brand-new website from scratch—introducing a modern layout, refined UI/UX, and an all-new page for purchasing the $PLQ coin directly from the web. The design now effectively highlights Planq’s core offerings and ensures a seamless experience across all devices.

Planq’s previous website lacked a modern structure and failed to communicate its unique mobile-first blockchain approach effectively. The design was outdated, offered limited user interaction, and didn’t support purchasing $PLQ tokens through the website—users had to rely solely on mobile apps. These limitations created friction for users, reduced engagement, and made it difficult to showcase Planq’s expanding ecosystem.

We designed and developed an entirely new website from the ground up. The new platform features a clean, modern UI that clearly communicates Planq’s vision. We introduced a dedicated page to allow users to buy $PLQ coins

, improving accessibility. With a mobile-first strategy and optimized UI/UX, we ensured a seamless experience across all devices, helping drive adoption and engagement across Planq’s growing community.

We designed and launched a brand-new Buy $PLQ page, allowing users to purchase tokens directly from the website. This upgrade removed the app-only limitation and improved accessibility across all devices with a clean, responsive interface.

Seo.title: Case Study: Application Tracking Software | Next.js, TypeScript, PHP & Laravel
Seo.description: RW Infotech developed a custom recruitment platform for the IT industry, automating hiring with Next.js, MUI, Python, and REST API for a seamless HR process.

body.Title: Application Tracking Software
body.Description: We helped the recruitment platform overcome slow performance, outdated technology, and a complex user interface by optimizing the front-end with Next.js and MUI. On the back-end, we streamlined architecture using PHP, Laravel, and REST API for improved speed and scalability. The revamped platform’s efficiency and user experience were significantly enhanced, helping HR teams save time and manage recruitment more effectively. The result? A faster, more scalable platform that grows with the company.

content.text: One of our clients faced challenges in managing hiring manually, making the process slow and inefficient. Finding and tracking candidates was difficult. RW Infotech built a custom recruitment platform to automate and simplify their hiring process.

RW Infotech developed a custom recruitment platform from scratch, focusing on speed and ease of use. We built a fast, intuitive front-end using Next.js and MUI, and optimized the back-end with Python and
for performance and scalability. The result is a streamlined platform that improves HR efficiency and supports business growth

The client was struggling with their manual recruitment process, which was slow, inefficient, and prone to errors. HR teams found it difficult to manage key tasks like sourcing, screening, and tracking candidates, leading to wasted time, miscommunication, and confusion. The absence of an automated system made it challenging to streamline hiring, often resulting in delays and missed opportunities to onboard top talent.

To address these challenges, the client needed a modern, automated recruitment platform that would simplify hiring, eliminate manual inefficiencies, and improve overall workflow. The new system had to be intuitive, easy to navigate, and scalable, ensuring it could handle future business growth without complications. Ultimately, the goal was to enhance efficiency, reduce workload, and allow HR teams to focus on hiring the right talent rather than getting bogged down by administrative processes.

RW Infotech developed a custom recruitment platform tailored to the client’s needs, ensuring a seamless and efficient hiring experience. We built a user-friendly interface using Next.js and MUI, providing a simple yet powerful system for HR teams to navigate and manage tasks effortlessly.

For the back-end, we implemented Python and REST API, ensuring the platform was fast, reliable, and highly scalable. This robust setup allowed for real-time data processing, automation of recruitment tasks, and easy integration with third-party tools. The platform automates key hiring functions, such as candidate sourcing, tracking, and application management, significantly reducing manual effort and improving productivity.

With this solution, the client now benefits from a streamlined hiring process, improved accuracy, and significant time savings, allowing HR teams to focus on what matters most—hiring the best talent efficiently.

Login Dashboard provides a secure and user-friendly interface for HR teams to access recruitment tools effortlessly. It enables quick navigation to candidate tracking, job postings, and analytics, streamlining the hiring process for improved efficiency.

Candidates Dashboard provides a comprehensive view of each candidate's journey, from application to onboarding. HR teams can easily track interview statuses, manage application progress, and update candidate details in real time

body.Heading: Scalable UI Components
body.Description: We created reusable, responsive UI components for the recruitment platform that are easy to deploy and scale as the platform grows. These components ensure a smooth, consistent experience for HR teams across devices.

Seo.title: Case Study: LeadTracker Full-Stack CRM for Lead & Task Management
Seo.description: See how RW Infotech transformed lead and task management for a growing sales team with LeadTracker — a responsive, scalable full-stack CRM platform.

body.Title: LeadTracker Full-Stack CRM
body.Description: We helped LeadTracker overcome performance issues and improve usability by optimizing the front-end with React and Tailwind CSS. On the back-end, we streamlined the architecture using Express.js and PostgreSQL for faster processing and better scalability. The enhanced platform delivers a smooth, real-time experience that helps sales and marketing teams manage leads and tasks more efficiently as their business grows.

body.Title: Case study
body.Heading: LeadTracker Full-Stack CRM for Lead and Task Management

content.text: One of our clients needed a better way to handle leads and tasks as their sales and marketing team grew. Their old tools were slow and didn’t support teamwork, user roles, or tracking team performance. RW Infotech built a custom CRM called LeadTracker — an easy-to-use platform that helps teams manage leads, assign tasks, and work together in real time, all in one place.

RW Infotech built a custom CRM tool to help sales and marketing teams manage their work more easily. We used React and TypeScript to create a fast and user-friendly interface, and Express.js with PostgreSQL for a strong and secure back-end. The system also includes real-time updates using Socket.IO, so teams can stay on the same page without delays. The result is a powerful yet simple platform that helps teams track leads, assign tasks, and work together more efficiently.

The client was facing challenges with managing leads and tasks manually. Their current system was slow, hard to manage, and didn’t support team collaboration. Sales and marketing teams had trouble keeping track of lead status, follow-ups, and task assignments, which often led to missed opportunities and confusion.

They needed a modern CRM system that was easy to use, worked in real-time, and could grow with their team. The goal was to simplify lead and task management, improve communication, and give team members the tools they needed to stay organized and productive.
RW Infotech built a custom CRM platform designed to make lead and task management simple and effective. We created a clean and responsive front-end using
, so the sales team could easily track leads, update tasks, and manage their workflow without confusion.

to build a fast, secure system that handles real-time updates and supports team collaboration. Features like live notifications, role-based access, and smart task filters helped reduce manual work and improve team productivity.
With this solution, the client now has a reliable CRM that keeps their team organized, saves time, and supports smooth communication, helping them close more deals, faster.

The leads dashboard is designed to work smoothly on all devices — desktops, tablets, and smartphones. This ensures users have a great experience no matter how they access the platform, making it easy to view, filter, and manage leads anytime, anywhere.

body.Heading: Scalable UI Components
body.Description: For LeadTracker, we developed reusable and responsive UI components that can easily adapt as the platform grows. These components help keep the interface consistent and user-friendly across all devices, making it simple for sales and marketing teams to manage leads and tasks without confusion.

Seo.title: Case Study SSD Nodes | SEO & Digital Marketing Strategies
Seo.description: Check out SSD Nodes case study on successful digital marketing strategies implemented for clients. How we improve on-page performance, backlinks, reach & sale

content.Name: Trust Pilot

body.Title: SSD Nodes Digital Marketing
body.Description: SSD Nodes approached us to enhance their online presence and improve their search rankings. They faced challenges with outdated content and technical SEO issues. We revamped their website structure, optimized for search engines, and launched targeted Google Ads campaigns. These improvements helped SSD Nodes attract more traffic and generate better leads, enhancing their overall online presence.

content.text: Discover how we revamped SSD Nodes' digital marketing strategy, doubling their organic user base in just four months. From enhancing social media engagement to scaling ad campaigns, we delivered a significant increase in revenue and CTR. Explore this case study to see how strategic digital marketing drives measurable business growth.

body.Heading: Project Overview
body.SubTitle: A comparison after we optimized the website
body.Description: RW Infotech collaborated with SSD Nodes to optimize their digital marketing efforts. Through strategic enhancements in social media, organic search, and online ad campaigns, we achieved a 100% increase in organic users and significantly boosted revenue and click-through rates, driving impactful business growth.

content.text: SSD Nodes faced significant challenges in their digital marketing efforts before partnering with RW Infotech. Despite investing heavily in Facebook and Google ads, they struggled to achieve their desired results. Their organic reach and website traffic were alarmingly low, with minimal visibility for targeted keywords. Their click-through rates (CTR) and revenue from online ads had hit an all-time low. Additionally, their website was poorly optimized, scoring just 34/100 on Google PageSpeed Insights, and their mobile design frequently broke on various devices. These issues led to a loss of sales and missed opportunities, compounding their digital marketing struggles.

We restructured their Facebook and Google ad campaigns, focusing on targeted audience segmentation, optimized ad creatives, and strategic bidding. This approach significantly improved click-through rates (CTR) and revenue, turning their ad spend into tangible results.

Our team implemented a robust SEO strategy, optimizing their website for targeted keywords, creating high-quality content, and building authoritative backlinks. This led to a 100% increase in organic traffic within four months.

We overhauled their website's technical infrastructure, improving its Google PageSpeed score from a poor 34 to an impressive 95. The site’s load time was reduced to under a second, ensuring a smooth and fast user experience.

We redesigned their mobile website to ensure flawless functionality across all devices, eliminating broken layouts and improving accessibility. This not only enhanced the user experience but also reduced missed opportunities and boosted mobile conversions.
By addressing each of these issues, we helped SSD Nodes achieve measurable improvements in performance, traffic, and sales, setting them up for sustained digital success.

Within a few weeks of work, we helped them rank many of their keywords to the first position on Google Search. With our strategic SEO efforts and targeted optimizations, we delivered remarkable results, enhancing visibility and driving more organic traffic than ever before.

body.Heading: Transformation in Key Metrics
body.SubTitle: A comparison after implementing our backlink strategy
body.Description: We helped SSD Nodes achieve remarkable growth by improving their Domain Rating, significantly increasing backlinks, and driving higher traffic and per-sale value. These before-and-after snapshots showcase the success of our collaborative efforts.

content.Name: G2

body.Title: Redsbaby
body.Description: We helped Redsbaby, an Australian baby products company to harness the full benefits of Headless CMS by Sanity and Bigcommerce for website development. We utilized Sanity's flexible content platform to enable seamless content updates, while Bigcommerce's e-commerce capabilities to streamline transactions. By integrating a modern design, intuitive navigation, and responsive layout, the new site offered seamless browsing across devices.

content.text: Redsbaby is a renowned baby product brand dedicated to creating innovative and stylish solutions for modern parents. With a commitment to design excellence, functionality, and safety, Redsbaby offers a range of strollers, prams, and accessories that cater to the evolving needs of families.

Redsbaby is committed to producing high-quality baby essentials like prams, carriers, and strollers. To showcase their diverse range of modern products, they required a cutting-edge website supported by advanced technologies such as Next.js,
To support their new age and aesthetic approach to the baby good, we provided them with a subtle color palette and font style.

Redsbaby encountered a significant hurdle as their broad array of modern baby products struggled to find alignment with an antiquated website. The existing platform lacked the sophistication necessary to effectively showcase their diverse offerings, impeding the brand's ability to engage customers and provide an optimal online shopping experience. content.text: Tilyo takes pride in being the pioneer in cultivating organic CBD in France, adhering to a conscientious and ethical approach. Opting for Tilyo translates to endorsing 100% French and local production, ensuring the preservation of distinctive expertise.

Tilyo approached us to enhance their website built on Prismic and Next.js, seeking improvements and expansions for their existing platform. Our efforts were directed towards refining the user experience and optimizing the overall functionality of the website.  By leveraging our expertise in Prismic and Next.js, we successfully implemented solutions that not only addressed the existing issues but also contributed to the seamless growth and evolution of Tilyo's online presence.

Tilyo approached us with a challenge in their website development, seeking improvements and expansions for their existing Prismic and Next.js-based platform. The primary issue revolved around difficulties in scaling the website effectively to accommodate their growing needs. The existing site structure posed limitations in expansion, hindering Tilyo's ability to incorporate new components and pages seamlessly. Our task was to address these constraints and enhance the overall website functionality. We were tasked with overcoming obstacles related to the website's design and interactivity, aiming to refine the user experience and optimize performance. The problem statement focused on the need for a comprehensive solution that not only resolved current issues but also allowed for the future growth and evolution of Tilyo's online presence. Our goal was to deliver a website that aligned with Tilyo's objectives and provided a resilient foundation for ongoing development and enhancement.

To address Tilyo's website development challenges, we implemented a comprehensive solution aimed at overcoming scalability limitations and enhancing overall functionality. Our approach involved a strategic redesign of the website architecture, leveraging our expertise in Prismic and Next.js.

Firstly, we conducted a thorough analysis of the existing site structure, identifying bottlenecks that hindered seamless expansion. Subsequently, we introduced scalable components and optimized page templates to accommodate Tilyo's growing needs. This involved the development of a modular system that allowed for easy integration of new features and content.

In addition, we implemented performance optimization techniques, ensuring swift loading times and improved responsiveness. This involved streamlining code, optimizing images, and employing caching mechanisms to enhance the overall user experience.

To address design and interactivity challenges, we introduced visually appealing yet functional elements, enhancing the website's aesthetics without compromising on performance. Interactive features were carefully integrated to engage users effectively.

, and Next.js. This strategic integration aims to provide an enhanced user experience, foster audience interaction, and ultimately contribute to increased sales for Mountain Tactical.

Seo.title: Case Study Hohme: Smart Home Management | Graphql | Strapi
Seo.description: Case study: Hohme. They faced challenges in creating a user-friendly dashboard and needed a platform that could handle dynamic content. Find out how we helped them.

content.Name: Host Advice

body.Title: Hohme
body.Description: In our project with Hohme, we tackled their need for a smarter, more intuitive web application to manage smart homes. By developing a sleek dashboard, integrating Strapi CMS with GraphQL, and enhancing user interaction with Next.js, we empowered homeowners to effortlessly control their smart appliances. Our solution streamlined operations, setting Hohme apart in the smart home industry.

content.text: Hohme is innovating the smart homeownership space, making home management and appliance control seamless and intuitive. For them, we crafted a dynamic dashboard, integrated smart appliance APIs using Strapi and GraphQL, and developed a responsive frontend with Next.js.

In our project with Hohme, we tackled their need for a smarter, more intuitive web application to manage smart homes. By developing a sleek dashboard, integrating Strapi CMS with GraphQL, and enhancing user interaction with Next.js, we empowered homeowners to effortlessly control their smart appliances. Our solution streamlined operations, setting Hohme apart in the smart home industry.

Hohme faced significant challenges in creating a user-friendly dashboard for their web application aimed at revolutionizing smart homeownership. They needed a Content Management System (CMS) that could handle dynamic content updates and integrate with third-party low-level device APIs, allowing users to control their appliances directly through the web application.

To address these challenges, we developed a comprehensive system architecture, utilizing Strapi as the CMS to manage content efficiently. We integrated GraphQL for effective data handling and chose Next.js with Redux for the frontend to ensure a responsive and engaging user experience. Additionally, we facilitated the integration of third-party APIs for appliance control, leveraging
, to enable straightforward management of smart home devices through the web application.

Our collaboration with Hohme led to the successful transformation of their web application into a user-friendly, innovative platform. By implementing a dynamic content management system with Strapi and integrating GraphQL, we streamlined content updates and management. The development of the frontend using Next.js, combined with Redux for state management, created a seamless and engaging user experience. Additionally, integrating third-party APIs for smart appliance control enabled homeowners to effortlessly manage their devices through the web application. The result was a cutting-edge solution that not only met Hohme’s initial requirements but also set a new standard in smart home management, making the homeownership experience simpler and more intuitive for users.

Seo.title: Case Study: Rush Order Tees - Prismic | Dynamo DB | NEXT.js
Seo.description: The case study explores how Rwit's data-driven approach transformed RushOrderTees' online presence, We continue to drive excellence and innovation in projects.

content.Name: G2

body.Title: Rush Order Tees
body.Description: Rush Order Tees is a custom apparel company and due to their tech-savvy ideologies, we suggested a Headless Commerce website using Prismic, Dynamo DB, and Nextjs. Prismic's headless CMS enabled effortless content management, while Jamstack's speed and security optimized user experience. The new site boasted quick load times, resulting in quick checkout flow which resulted in a boost in conversions within a few months.

content.text: Rush Order Tees delivers top-quality customized apparel with lightning-fast turnaround times. With a commitment to swift turnarounds and premium materials, they transform customers' ideas into personalized tees that exceed expectations.

Rush order Tees sought a resilient online store capable of managing the multitude of orders their business attracts. Additionally, they required a user-friendly feature enabling customers to personalize their orders.

Rushorder Tees encountered operational hurdles with their existing system, struggling to manage the influx of orders efficiently. The absence of a robust webshop hindered seamless order processing. Additionally, the lack of a user-friendly customization feature posed a challenge, impacting the overall customer experience. The pressing need to address these issues arose from the company's commitment to meeting customer demands promptly and enhancing the online ordering process. A comprehensive solution was required to streamline order management and provide customers with an intuitive customization interface, ensuring a smoother, more satisfying transaction process for both the business and its clientele.
To address Rushorder Tees' operational challenges, we propose a comprehensive solution involving the migration from Gatsby to Next.js, integrated with the content management capabilities of Prismic.

Firstly, we will execute a seamless transition from Gatsby to Next.js, leveraging the strengths of Next.js for enhanced server-side rendering and improved scalability, crucial for managing the high volume of incoming orders.

Simultaneously, we will integrate Prismic as the content management system, enabling efficient content updates and customization options for users. This integration will empower Rushorder Tees to easily manage product information and facilitate a user-friendly customization experience.

By combining Next.js for robust web performance, Prismic for streamlined content management, and implementing intuitive customization features, the proposed solution aims to optimize operational efficiency, elevate user experience, and meet Rushorder Tees' commitment to prompt order fulfillment and customer satisfaction.

Seo.title: Case Study: Carbmee - Prismic | Next.js | Redux | GSAP
Seo.description: Explore our journey to enhance sustainability. Witness website migration to Prismic Headless CMS with Next.js and GSAP enhanced user experience and efficiency.

content.Name: Host Advice

body.Title: Carbmee
body.Description: Carbmee, a dynamic company in need of a digital facelift, approached us to address significant challenges with their existing website. The primary issues were the absence of a content management system (CMS) for easy content updates and poor website performance, including slow loading times that hindered user experience and efficiency.

content.text: Carbmee is revolutionizing the way companies tackle carbon reduction, making it simpler and more efficient to lower their environmental impact. We helped them migrate their existing site to Prismic Headless CMS with Next.js and GSAP.

Carbmee, a dynamic company in need of a digital facelift, approached us to address significant challenges with their existing website. The primary issues were the absence of a content management system (CMS) for easy content updates and poor website performance, including slow loading times that hindered user experience and efficiency.

Carbmee had two major issues with their website that were preventing them from achieving their goal of promoting sustainability. Firstly, their Content Management System (CMS) was not dynamic, which meant that even the slightest updates required developer intervention. This made content management inefficient and hindered scalability. Secondly, the website's performance was poor, with slow loading times that negatively impacted user experience and engagement.

We suggested a comprehensive solution to revamp Carbmee's website, which focused on enhancing the website's backend flexibility and the user experience on the front-end. Our proposal included the following key elements:

: We recommended moving to Prismic Headless CMS, which is a powerful and user-friendly platform that would allow the Carbmee team to manage content dynamically without needing constant involvement from developers.
: We recommended using Slice Machine, which is a tool that makes it easy to create page templates. This would empower the Carbmee team to efficiently manage and update their website.
: By leveraging Next.js, we ensured that the website was not only responsive but also optimized for speed, which would improve search engine optimization (SEO) and user engagement.

: To capture the attention of the audience and enhance the visual appeal of the website, we implemented custom animations using GSAP, which were tailored to Carbmee's branding and user interaction goals.

content.Name: Trust Pilot

body.Title: SSD Nodes
body.Description: SSD Nodes approached us to improve the conversion rate of their existing website. They were facing challenges in adding new features to the site due to their use of WHMCS. To address their needs, we redesigned their outdated website, modernized their legacy code, and developed custom WHMCS add-ons to enhance the site's functionality.

content.text: SSD Nodes, a Strasmore Inc. company, offers affordable VPS servers globally via a WHMCS-based platform. We developed custom addons for WHMCS to provide them with unique features.

body.Heading: Project Overview
body.SubTitle: A comparison after we improve the main dashboard UI
body.Description:
SSD Nodes approached us to improve the conversion rate of their existing
website. They were facing challenges in adding new features to the site
due to their use of WHMCS. To address their needs, we redesigned their
outdated website, modernized their legacy code, and developed custom
WHMCS add-ons to enhance the site's functionality.

content.text: SSD Nodes, known for their commitment to offering affordable VPS solutions, recently faced a few roadblocks with their WHMCS-based website that made things a bit tricky. First off, the website was built on what you might call 'old-school' code. This made sprucing things up or fixing bugs more of a chore than it should be. Then, there was the challenge of turning visitors into customers — the site just wasn't doing a good job at convincing people to take the plunge. And to top it all off, the website couldn't quite keep up with all the new features and updates SSD Nodes wanted to offer, making it tough to meet the growing needs of their business and their users. It was clear that a makeover was in order, not just to keep things running smoothly, but also to ensure SSD Nodes could continue delivering the great service they're known for.

In response to these challenges, a strategic and comprehensive solution was implemented. Initially, a thorough audit of the website was conducted to identify the core areas needing improvement. Following this, an expert team comprising Developers and UI designers was quickly assembled. Their first course of action was to completely redesign the marketing website from scratch. This redesign focused on accurately representing SSD Nodes' brand, making it more appealing and accessible, especially to users on mobile devices. In addition to the aesthetic overhaul, significant backend enhancements were made. This involved the creation of custom WHMCS addons and a modernization of the old code base, vastly improving the website's functionality and user experience.
